title: Section 35
content: (1) The Financial Corporation shall establish a reserve fund. (2) After making provision for bad and doubtful debts, depreciation of assets and all other matters which are usually provided for by banking companies, the Financial Corporation may out of its net annual profits declare a dividend; 1***** 2*****
footnote: 1. The proviso omitted by s. 22, ibid. (w.e.f. 5-9-2000). 2. Omitted by Act 39 of 2000, s. 22 (w.e.f. 5-9-2000).
